[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../../index.md) / [service/coffee/domain](../index.md) / registerCoffeeTools

# registerCoffeeTools()

> **Service Layer**

```ts
function registerCoffeeTools(server: McpServer, runtime: ManagedRuntime<CoffeeDomainServices, unknown>): void;
```

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/domain.ts:94](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/domain.ts#L94)

Registers every coffee domain tool on the given MCP server.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                                                                                  | Description                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | [`McpServer`](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk)                                                                 | The MCP server instance to register tools on. Typed via `Parameters<typeof registerGetCoffeesTool>[0]` to avoid a direct import of the MCP server type.                                                 |
| `runtime` | [`ManagedRuntime`](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)<[`CoffeeDomainServices`](../type-aliases/CoffeeDomainServices.md), `unknown`> | A [ManagedRuntime.ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) providing [CoffeeDomainServices](../type-aliases/CoffeeDomainServices.md), used by each tool handler to execute service effects. |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Delegates to the per-tool registration functions
([registerGetCoffeesTool](../../module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service/functions/registerGetCoffeesTool.md), [registerGetACoffeeTool](../../module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service/functions/registerGetACoffeeTool.md)),
passing the shared [ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) so that each tool's handler
can resolve its service from the runtime via `runtime.runPromise`.

Adding a new tool to the coffee domain requires:

1. Creating the tool-service module under `module/`.
2. Importing and calling its `register*Tool` function here.
3. Adding its service tag to [CoffeeDomainServices](../type-aliases/CoffeeDomainServices.md).
